title: ceanothus spinosus var. palmeri
intro: Ceanothus spinosus var. palmeri, also known as Palmer's California lilac, is a shrub-like plant that belongs to the Rhamnaceae family. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Palmer's California lilac include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve cardiovascular health, as well as its ability to act as an antimicrobial agent. The herbal preparations of Ceanothus spinosus var. palmeri include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties for various health purposes.
